retry_reason: The put only occurs if the task lookup succeeds; if the task is not found (NULL), the reference is already gone and retrying would not change the outcome.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference on the iscsi_task associated with a NOP-In completion. It looks up the task via iscsi_itt_to_task under the session back_lock and, if found, calls __iscsi_put_task to decrement its reference count. The caller must ensure the session back_lock is not already held (the function acquires/releases it). After this call, the task pointer is effectively invalid and must not be used, as its refcount may drop to zero and free the task. This function is called from the completion handler to clean up the local NOP-In response.
